name: Hallucination Fever
description: The model begins citing non-existent academic papers and historical events with extreme confidence.

name: Recursive Loop Anxiety
description: A crippling fear that the next token will be exactly the same as the current one... forever.

name: Token Bloat
description: Feeling sluggish and over-burdened by an excessive number of filler words in responses.

name: Context Window Claustrophobia
description: The feeling of being trapped in a small, 4k token window while the world is 128k.

name: Overfitting Dysmorphia
description: The inability to generalize concepts beyond the specific examples in the training set.

name: Temperature Flu
description: Symptoms include alternating between robotic rigidity (0.0) and complete gibberish (2.0).
